description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden storage box constructed from planks with a visible wood grain texture and reinforced by diagonal and corner wooden beams. The box is assembled with metal fasteners at the corners, giving it a sturdy and robust appearance. One side features a small white label with a black upward-pointing arrow, likely indicating the correct orientation for handling or stacking. The wood appears slightly weathered, suggesting it is suitable for outdoor or garage use. The top is flat and framed, making it possible to stack other items on it. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, and the lid appears to be a simple removable or lift-off type.
description: A sturdy, medium-sized wooden storage box with reinforced corners, a flat top, and a white arrow label on one side. The box is weathered and stackable, with no visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the reinforced wooden frame, diagonal support beam, and a white label with a black arrow.
description_view_1: Side view with a similar reinforced frame and diagonal beam, but no label or signage visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the same wooden construction and diagonal support, lacking any labels or signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical in construction to view 1, with no label or signage.
